title: Young: OPEC Exit is UAE Taking an Independent Stance
title_cn: 杨：退出欧佩克是阿联酋采取独立立场
summary:
The UAE's decision to quit OPEC has been driven by its worsening rift with Saudi Arabia. Abu Dhabi is now also considering its membership of regional bodies, including the Arab League and the Organization of Islamic Cooperation, and is reassessing its role in the GCC. Karen Young, Senior Research Scholar in the Center on Global Energy Policy, Columbia University spoke to Bloomberg’s Horizons Middle East and Africa anchor Joumanna Bercetche on the oil market reaction to this move.

Original filename: 20260430_052530_UAE_s_Departure_from_OPEC_Raises_Geopolitical_Questions_Amid.mp4 (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: The European Central Bank is set to keep interest rates unchanged on Thursday as it continues to calibrate its response to the Iran war’s economic fallout.

title: French Economy Unexpectedly Failed to Grow as Iran Shock Hit
title_cn: 伊朗危机袭来，法国经济意外未能增长
summary: France’s economy failed to grow while prices jumped more than expected, a sign that Europe may be succumbing to stagflationary threats emanating from the Iran war.

title: Copper Steadies After Five Days of Losses on Iran War Pessimism

title: Yen Intervention Risk Builds as Central Banks Delay Rate Moves
title_cn: 随着央行延迟利率的变化，日元干预风险加剧
summary: Investors increasingly see official intervention in the market as the only near-term lever to stem the yen’s slide, as central banks delay adjusting interest rates and Middle East tensions push oil prices higher.

title: Oil Hits Wartime High on Report US Eyeing Iran Military Options | Daybreak Europe 04/30/2026
title_cn: 有报道称美国关注伊朗军事选择，油价触及战时高位欧洲黎明 04/30/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

On today's show, Brent crude rallied to a wartime high, spiking above $126 a barrel, after Axios reported that US President Donald Trump is being briefed on options for new military action in Iran.

Nasdaq 100 futures erased earlier gains that were driven by robust US tech earnings. Alphabet jumped after reporting a clear payoff for Google from its AI spending. But Meta tumbled after announcing another hike in capex. Traders now look ahead to Apple earnings.

Plus, the Federal Reserve held rates in a split vote. Four policymakers dissented.

Today's guests: Ida Lerner, ING, CFO & Stefan Dörfler, Erste Group, CFO. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iran War Splits Asia’s Diesel Market Into Haves and Have-Nots
title_cn: 伊朗战争将亚洲柴油市场分为贫富两极
summary: The war in the Middle East has left Asian buyers grappling with a two-speed diesel economy, as poorer states face acute shortfalls, while wealthier nations with large refining industries enjoy sizable buffers.

title: BNP Paribas CFO: Took Provisions Against Macro Uncertainty
title_cn: 法国巴黎银行首席财务官：针对宏观不确定性采取了措施
summary: The BNP Paribas CFO cited a ‘wait-and-see’ attitude from corporates in the first-quarter, and argued he took provisions against the macroeconomic uncertainties. That’s after France’s largest bank reported net income that beat estimates in the first quarter, driven by a strong performance in equities trading. The CFO Lars Machenil spoke exclusively to Bloomberg Television on the ‘Opening Trade’. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BP and Venezuela Sign Pact to Explore for Offshore Gas
title_cn: 英国石油公司与委内瑞拉签署勘探海上天然气协议
summary: BP Plc and Venezuela agreed on a deal to explore for natural gas offshore as the South American country’s energy revival gathers pace following the US capture of Nicolas Maduro.

title: Asean Vows to Avoid Export Bans, Share Fuel as Oil Prices Soar
title_cn: 东盟誓言避免出口禁令，在油价飙升之际共享燃料
summary: The Association of Southeast Asian Nations vowed to avoid trade restrictions and push ahead with a fuel-sharing scheme as the region grapples with a spike in oil prices and supply disruptions due to the Iran war.

title: Europe’s Embattled Software Firms Rise Above AI, Iran Challenges
title_cn: 欧洲陷入困境的软件公司超越人工智能和伊朗的挑战
summary: Europe’s software companies are doing better than expected this earnings season, brushing off fears around artificial intelligence and the impact of the Iran war on business confidence.

title: Asia Growth at Risk as Oil Surges to Wartime High | Insight with Haslinda Amin 04/30/2026
title_cn: 石油价格飙升至战时高点，亚洲经济增长面临风险哈斯琳达·阿明的见解 04/30/2026
summary: Insight with Haslinda Amin, a daily news program featuring in-depth, high-profile interviews and analysis to give viewers the complete picture on the stories that matter. The show features prominent leaders spanning the worlds of business, finance, politics and culture. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Investindustrial Raises €1.5 Billion for Lower Mid-Market Fund
title_cn: Investindustrial 为中低端市场基金筹集 15 亿欧元
summary: Investindustrial has raised €1.5 billion ($1.75 billion) for its latest lower mid-market private equity fund, surpassing an initial target in a speedy four-month raise.

title: Higher Oil Prices May Spur Quicker Yield Gains in Emerging Asia
title_cn: 油价上涨可能会刺激亚洲新兴市场的产量更快增长
summary: Higher-for-longer oil prices threaten a faster rise in emerging Asian bond yields, if history is any guide — a risk market watchers say isn’t yet fully priced in.

title: Macron Moves to Name Top Ally Moulin to Lead Bank of France
title_cn: 马克龙任命高级盟友穆兰领导法国央行
summary: Emmanuel Macron’s chief of staff will leave next week, suggesting the French president is about to nominate a close ally to run the central bank.

title: CATL Share Sale Pressures HK Premium, Boosting Popular Trade
title_cn: 宁德时代减股施压港股溢价，提振大众交易
summary: A blockbuster share sale by Contemporary Amperex Technology Co. Ltd. is poised to further chip away at the unusually high premium on the company’s Hong Kong-listed shares, potentially bringing them closer in line with its Shenzhen stock, analysts said.

title: ECB Set to Hold Rates as Policymakers Assess War Impact
title_cn: 政策制定者评估战争影响时欧洲央行将维持利率不变
summary: A unanimous survey of economists said the European Central Bank is set to keep interest rates unchanged at 2% on Thursday, as policymakers continue to weigh the economic impact of the Iran war. Bloomberg's Oliver Crook reports from Frankfurt. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BOE Expected to Keep Rates Unchanged at 3.75%
title_cn: 预计英国央行将维持利率在 3.75% 不变
summary: The Bank of England is likely to keep interest rates on hold at 3.75% on Thursday, economists say, as policymakers balance the risk of a prolonged energy price shock from the Iran war against a subdued domestic economic picture. Bloomberg Economics' Matthew Bunny has a preview of the decision. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Naval Blockade Pushes Iran’s Currency to Record Low
title_cn: 美国海军封锁使伊朗货币跌至历史新低
summary: Iran’s currency has fallen in recent days to a fresh record low, in a sign the US’s naval blockade is squeezing the Islamic Republic’s economy.

title: FTSE 100 and Pound Hold Steady Ahead of BOE
title_cn: 富时 100 指数和英镑指数保持稳定领先于英国央行

title: China Manufacturing Expands Despite War, Wobbly Domestic Demand
title_cn: 中国制造业在战争和内需不稳定的情况下仍在扩张
summary: Chinese construction activity suffered its biggest slump since the early stages of the Covid pandemic and the services sector fell back into contraction, even as exports kept factories humming despite the disruptions caused by the war in Iran.

title: Demand at Japan’s Two-Year Note Sale Jumps to Highest Since 2024
title_cn: 日本两年期国债发行需求跃升至 2024 年以来最高水平
summary: Japan’s two-year government bond auction on Thursday drew the strongest demand since August 2024, supported by higher yields and expectations that the Bank of Japan may not rush into further interest rate hikes.

title: India’s Rupee Drops to Record Low as Crude Surge Deepens Worries
title_cn: 由于原油价格飙升加剧担忧，印度卢比跌至历史新低
summary: India’s rupee slid to a record low as crude prices continued their relentless surge, deepening worries about the nation’s external deficit.

title: Japan Utilities Withhold Earnings Guidance as Fuel Costs Bite
title_cn: 由于燃料成本上涨，日本公用事业公司暂缓公布盈利指引
summary: Several Japanese power producers have withheld full-year earnings guidance due to uncertainty around the supply and cost of liquefied natural gas.

title: SoftBank Plans to Create and List AI Vehicle Roze in the US
title_cn: 软银计划创建人工智能汽车Roze并在美国上市
summary: SoftBank Group Corp. plans to establish and list an AI and robotics company called Roze in the US, potentially raising capital to propel founder Masayoshi Son’s growing bets on artificial intelligence.

title: Murata Tops Profit Estimates on Rising AI Data Center Demand
title_cn: 村田制作所因人工智能数据中心需求不断增长而超出利润预期
summary: Murata Manufacturing Co. reported fourth-quarter earnings that beat analyst estimates, fueled by robust demand from artificial intelligence data center builders.

title: Samsung Beats Estimates After Chip Sales Defy War Fears
title_cn: 芯片销售战胜战争恐惧后三星超出预期
summary: Samsung Electronics Co. earned a far stronger-than-expected eight-fold leap in quarterly profit, underscoring robust demand for AI memory chips in the face of markets roiled by war in the Middle East.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kosovo’s Tech Boom Is Saving Its Young People from Unemployment
title_cn: 科索沃的科技繁荣使其年轻人免于失业
summary: From the rooftop terrace of Kosovo’s innovation center, Shpend Lila pointed out a red-brick building on a recent weekday morning. Originally the headquarters of a local publishing agency, the modernist structure was Pristina’s tallest for decades. Today, it is dwarfed by high-rises housing a growing mix of tech companies — including SPEEEX, a business processing outsource firm on track to become the country’s first unicorn.

title: Anthropic Plan to Expand Mythos Access Is Opposed by White House
title_cn: 扩大神话访问范围的人为计划遭到白宫反对
summary: The White House opposes a plan by Anthropic PBC to expand access to its Mythos AI model, an administration official said Wednesday night.

title: Samsung’s Chip Profit Soars 48-Fold Due to AI Spending Spree
title_cn: 人工智能支出狂潮，三星芯片利润飙升 48 倍
summary: Samsung Electronics Co.’s semiconductor arm brought in historic profit over the March quarter, beating expectations with a 48-fold jump as AI data center orders delivered hefty margins.

title: Mphasis CEO on Business Strategy, AI Investments
title_cn: Mphasis 首席执行官，负责人工智能投资业务战略
summary: Nitin Rakesh, CEO at Indian IT firm Mphasis, discusses the company's business strategy and its investments in AI. He speaks with Haidi Stroud-Watts on Bloomberg: The Asia Trade. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Cambricon Shares Jump 14% After Its AI Chip Sales Surge in China
title_cn: 寒武纪AI芯片在中国销量激增，股价大涨14%
summary: Chinese AI chipmaker Cambricon Technologies Corp.’s shares surged 14% in Shanghai, after its first-quarter sales more than doubled thanks to Beijing’s push for self-sufficiency in critical technologies including semiconductors.

title: SoftBank’s $40 Billion Loan for OpenAI Stake Draws More Banks
title_cn: 软银为 OpenAI 股份提供 400 亿美元贷款吸引了更多银行
summary: Banks that recently signed a $40 billion bridge loan with SoftBank Group Corp. for its investment in US tech giant OpenAI have attracted more lenders to the deal in syndication, people familiar with the matter said.

title: Musk Put on Defensive Over His Financial Commitment to OpenAI
title_cn: 马斯克对 OpenAI 的财务承诺进行了辩护
summary: Elon Musk became visibly irritated on the witness stand Wednesday as an attorney for OpenAI questioned whether the billionaire backed off his financial commitment to the startup in its early years.

title: AI-Led Rally in Asia Stocks Masks Deeper Damage from Iran War
title_cn: 人工智能引领的亚洲股市上涨掩盖了伊朗战争造成的更严重损害
summary: Asia’s artificial intelligence-fueled rally is masking signs of strain, with gains in tech names overshadowing the impact of the US-Iran war on the broader market.

title: Samsung, SK Hynix Payouts to Fuel Rate Hikes, Mirae Asset Says
title_cn: Mirae Asset 称三星和 SK 海力士将支付燃料费上涨费用
summary: The extraordinary wealth generated from South Korean chipmakers will drive spending and inflation, spurring the nation’s central bank to raise interest rates at least three times over the coming year, according to Mirae Asset Global Investments.

title: OpenAI Meets Key AI Computing Capacity Goal Ahead of Schedule
title_cn: OpenAI 提前实现人工智能计算能力关键目标
summary: OpenAI has met a key milestone for securing AI capacity in the US several years ahead of schedule, boosting the startup’s ambitious plans for data center expansion.

title: Startup Bringing Brains to AI Aims for $2.5 Billion Valuation
title_cn: 将大脑引入人工智能的初创公司估值达到 25 亿美元
summary: Thomas Reardon, who led the work on Meta Platforms Inc.’s Neural Band, is raising funds for a new startup called Flourish to develop energy-efficient artificial intelligence, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Alphabet, Amazon Outpace Meta in AI During Earnings Bonanza
title_cn: Alphabet、亚马逊在人工智能领域的盈利丰厚，超过了 Meta
summary: A frenzied day of earnings reports offered a glimpse at how some of the world’s biggest tech companies are doing in artificial intelligence. The upshot: Alphabet Inc.’s Google is seeing a clear payoff from its AI spending, while Meta Platforms Inc. is lagging behind.

title: Fujitsu Falls Most in 11 Years After Forecast Misses Estimates
title_cn: 预测未达预期，富士通股价创 11 年来最大跌幅
summary: Fujitsu Ltd. shares fell as much as 14%, the most in 11 years, after the company’s fourth-quarter operating profit and full-year forecast missed analyst estimates.

title: Microsoft Projects ‘Modest’ Cloud Acceleration Amid AI Jitters
title_cn: 微软计划在人工智能紧张的情况下进行“适度”的云加速
summary: Microsoft Corp. said cloud computing revenue and spending on AI infrastructure will accelerate this year, a bid to convince investors that its huge bets on artificial intelligence are poised to pay off.

title: Amazon Reports Higher Spending to Fuel Cloud Unit Sales
title_cn: 亚马逊报告增加支出以推动云单位销售
summary: Amazon.com Inc. is spending at a rapid rate to expand data center capacity to meet the intense demand for artificial intelligence computing power, fueling the fastest quarterly sales growth for its cloud unit in more than three years.

title: Alphabet Sales Beat Estimates on Google Cloud, AI Customers
title_cn: Alphabet 谷歌云、人工智能客户的销售额超出预期
summary: Alphabet Inc. reported high demand for its cloud and artificial intelligence offerings, boosting shares and giving investors confidence that its unprecedented investments in AI infrastructure will pay off.

title: Meta Shares Plunge on Rising Concerns Over AI Spending Spree
title_cn: 由于对人工智能支出热潮的担忧加剧，Meta 股价暴跌
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. Chief Executive Officer Mark Zuckerberg reignited fears that the historic levels of investment he’s making to catch up in the artificial intelligence race won’t pay off, a prospect that sent shares sliding after the company raised its spending outlook for the year.

title: Qualcomm Rallies on Data Center Inroads, China Recovery
title_cn: 高通因数据中心进展和中国复苏而上涨
summary: Qualcomm Inc. rallied in late trading after the company said it was making headway in the lucrative data center market and predicted that the China phone industry would bounce back.

title: Anthropic Weighs Funding Offers at Over $900 Billion Valuation
title_cn: Anthropic 的融资报价估值超过 9000 亿美元
summary: Anthropic PBC has begun weighing a fresh funding round that would value the artificial intelligence developer at more than $900 billion, according to people familiar with the matter, potentially leapfrogging its longtime rival OpenAI as the world’s most valuable AI startup.

title: What Latest Tech Earnings Signal for Apple, Nvidia
title_cn: 苹果和英伟达的最新科技盈利信号是什么
summary: Daniel Flax, Neuberger senior research analyst, discusses what the latest round of tech earnings could portend for AI companies like Apple, Broadcom and Nvidia on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Meta Shares Plunge as AI Investments Raise Spending Outlook
title_cn: 人工智能投资提升支出前景，Meta 股价暴跌
summary:
Meta Platforms Inc. shares slid after the company raised its spending outlook for the year, reigniting fears that the historic levels of investment it’s making to build artificial intelligence models won’t pay off.
The social-media giant projected full-year capital expenditures between $125 billion and $145 billion, far exceeding analysts’ estimates and marking a roughly 7.4% increase from what the company had previously projected. The company is dealing with “higher component pricing” and additional data center costs, Chief Financial Officer Susan Li said in a statement. Bloomberg's Kurt Wagner joins to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The 10 Billion Startup Training AI To Do Your Job
title_cn: 100 亿初创公司培训 AI 来完成你的工作
summary: San Francisco tech startup, Mercor, is hiring high-skilled workers for a massive undertaking: teaching AI how to do their jobs. On today’s Big Take podcast, reporter Tom Foster and host Sarah Holder break down how Mercor’s college-dropout founders built a $10 billion company aimed at automating the white-collar world. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Luria Sees Good Signs Ahead for Big Tech After Earnings
title_cn: 卢里亚在财报公布后看到大型科技公司未来的良好迹象
summary: DA Davidson Managing Director Gil Luria offers his key takeaways on earnings from Amazon, Microsoft and Meta Platforms. He speaks on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US House Probes Airbnb, Anysphere’s Use of Chinese AI Models
title_cn: 美国众议院调查 Airbnb 和 Anysphere 使用中国人工智能模型
summary: House Republicans are investigating American technology companies’ use of Chinese artificial intelligence models, part of a broader push by Congress to limit US national security risks and to counter Beijing in the global AI race.

title: Stripe’s Push to Bring AI to Payments, Commerce
title_cn: Stripe 致力于将人工智能引入支付和商业领域
summary: Stripe announced several new AI tools Wednesday, including a new partnership with Google, aimed at building AI tools for payments and commerce. Stripe President and co-founder John Collison discusses the company’s AI strategy with Bloomberg Tech's Ed Ludlow.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: 80 Seconds of Big Tech Earnings To Set Market’s Fate | Bloomberg Tech 4/29/2026
title_cn: 80 秒大型科技公司财报决定市场命运 |彭博科技 2026 年 4 月 29 日
summary:
Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow discuss expectations for big tech earnings as investors prepare for Microsoft, Meta, Google, and Amazon to report earnings after the market closes. Plus, SoFi CEO Anthony Noto discusses investors' reaction to the financial services company’s earnings as its shares fall. And, Elon Musk continues testifying in his suit against OpenAI over the startup's pivot from a charity to a for-profit business.

 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Taiwan Leader’s Last-Minute Plea to Fly Via Europe Was Rejected
title_cn: 台湾领导人最后一刻请求飞经欧洲遭拒绝
summary: Germany and the Czech Republic denied requests for Taiwan President Lai Ching-te to transit through Europe earlier this month, dooming his last-minute effort to circumvent a China-backed blockade of his first diplomatic trip to Africa, people familiar with the matter said.

title: US Eyes Fresh Iran Military Options: Report
title_cn: 美国关注伊朗新的军事选择：报告
summary: US President Donald Trump is set to receive a briefing on new military options for action in Iran, signaling the potential for fresh escalation in the Middle East. US Central Command’s Admiral Brad Cooper will meet Trump on Thursday, according to an Axios report, which cited two unnamed people. Bloomberg's Joumanna Bercetche reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Modi Holds Narrow Edge Over Rivals in Key State, Exit Polls Show
title_cn: 出口民意调查显示，莫迪在关键州以微弱优势领先于竞争对手
summary: Prime Minister Narendra Modi had a slight edge over his main rival in the key Indian state of West Bengal, exit polls from the closely contested election showed, giving the ruling party the chance to govern the region for the first time ever.

title: Andy Burnham on Role of Cities, Local Elections, Political Ambitions
title_cn: 安迪·伯纳姆 (Andy Burnham) 谈城市的作用、地方选举、政治野心
summary: Greater Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham discusses the role of cities in pushing back against divisive politics, the upcoming UK local elections, and Keir Starmer’s leadership. Burnham spoke to Bloomberg from the 12th Bloomberg CityLab Summit in Madrid. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says He Rejects Iran’s Hormuz Offer, Sustains Blockade
title_cn: 特朗普称他拒绝伊朗的霍尔木兹海峡提议并维持封锁
summary: President Donald Trump told Axios he will not lift a naval blockade of Iran’s ports until he secures a deal with Tehran to address the country’s nuclear program, extending a standoff over the Strait of Hormuz that has caused a global energy crisis.

title: DHS Shutdown Nears End as House Approves Republican Budget Plan
title_cn: 众议院批准共和党预算计划，国土安全部关闭接近结束
summary: The record-breaking 74-day shutdown of the Department of Homeland Security is nearing an end after House Speaker Mike Johnson united his fractious Republicans behind a two-part budget plan aimed at fully funding the department.

title: US Seeks Forfeiture of Seized Oil Tankers Linked to Iran
title_cn: 美国寻求没收与伊朗有关的被扣押油轮
summary: The US is seeking forfeiture of two Iran-linked oil tankers seized by naval forces enforcing a blockade against the Islamic Republic, according to a senior administration official.

title: Mexico’s Sinaloa Governor Is Indicted in US on Drug Charges
title_cn: 墨西哥锡那罗亚州州长因毒品指控在美国被起诉
summary: The governor of the Mexican state of Sinaloa was accused by US prosecutors of conspiring with drug cartels, escalating tension between the two countries over the fight against organized crime.

title: Australia Tells China Stable Trade Needs Stable Fuel Supply
title_cn: 澳大利亚告诉中国稳定的贸易需要稳定的燃料供应
summary: Australia’s Foreign Minister Penny Wong delivered a strong message to China on Wednesday: stable shipments of commodities and food require continued imports of petrol, jet fuel and fertilizer.

title: Fed Keeps Rates Steady As Powell's Leadership Nears End | Balance of Power: Late Edition 04/29/2026
title_cn: 鲍威尔领导地位接近尾声，美联储维持利率稳定权力平衡：最新版 04/29/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Michael Allen, Managing Director of Beacon Global Strategies and former Special Assistant to President George W. Bush, says the US should "give it time" for a Strait of Hormuz blockade to pressure Iran economically. Senator Elissa Slotkin (D-MI) and Senator Bernie Moreno (R-OH) discuss their bipartisan Connected Vehicle Security Act of 2026, warning Chinese-made cars pose a "driving surveillance package" risk and could enable espionage or even remote vehicle takeovers. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Brazil Senate Rejects Lula’s Pick to Join Supreme Court
title_cn: 巴西参议院拒绝卢拉加入最高法院的选择
summary: Brazil’s Senate rejected President Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva’s nominee to fill a vacant seat on the Supreme Court, a stinging political setback for the leftist leader as he seeks reelection.

title: Trump Reviewing Troop Levels in Germany as Iran Strains Ties
title_cn: 特朗普在伊朗关系紧张之际审查驻德美军人数
summary: President Donald Trump said the US is reviewing its troop levels in Germany and will decide soon whether to reduce that number, escalating tensions with a top NATO ally over the war in Iran.

title: King Charles Meets CEOs in Bid to Promote US-UK Investment
title_cn: 查尔斯国王会见首席执行官以促进美英投资
summary: King Charles III gathered leaders of some of the world’s biggest companies to encourage US-UK investment, as he swung through New York as part of a state visit aimed at shoring up ties between the two allies.

title: Sen. Slotkin, Sen. Moreno on China Auto Threat
title_cn: 它是。斯洛特金、莫雷诺参议员是中国汽车威胁
summary: Senator Elissa Slotkin (D-MI) and Senator Bernie Moreno (R-OH) discuss their bipartisan Connected Vehicle Security Act of 2026, warning Chinese-made cars pose a "driving surveillance package" risk and could enable espionage or even remote vehicle takeovers. The two also weigh in on the Iran conflict, with Moreno backing the administration's approach and Slotkin calling for greater congressional authorization and oversight of military action and spending. They speak with Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Milei Stands by His Cabinet Chief Amid a Growing Corruption Scandal
title_cn: 米雷在日益严重的腐败丑闻中支持内阁首长
summary: Argentina’s Javier Milei emphasized his support for an embattled member of his government, standing proudly by a cabinet chief embroiled in the type of corruption scandal he vowed to eradicate upon taking office.

title: Ford in Talks With US on Defense-Related Projects, CEO Says
title_cn: 首席执行官表示，福特正在与美国就国防相关项目进行谈判
summary: Ford Motor Co. is in early discussions with the Trump administration about working on defense projects, Chief Executive Officer Jim Farley said.

title: Ex-Bush NSC Official on Iran Blockade
title_cn: 前布什国家安全委员会官员谈伊朗封锁
summary: Michael Allen, Managing Director of Beacon Global Strategies and former Special Assistant to President George W. Bush, says the US should "give it time" for a Strait of Hormuz blockade to pressure Iran economically, even as such efforts "work slowly." He speaks with Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Pentagon’s $25 Billion Price Tag for Iran War May Miss Key Costs
title_cn: 五角大楼为伊朗战争花费的 250 亿美元可能会错过关键成本
summary: Top Pentagon officials finally put a price tag on the war in Iran so far during a contentious congressional hearing on Wednesday. Analysts say the $25 billion figure they cited underestimates the total cost by a large amount.

title: ABC License Renewal Call Surprised FCC Staff and Shattered Norms
title_cn: ABC 牌照更新电话令 FCC 工作人员感到惊讶，规范被打破
summary: The Federal Communications Commission’s decision to accelerate a license review of Walt Disney Co.’s ABC TV stations caught many people in the agency by surprise, laying the foundation for a likely protracted legal battle over a norm-shattering strategy shift.

title: Bessent Says Powell Staying On Is ‘Violation’ of All Fed Norms
title_cn: 贝森特称鲍威尔留任“违反”了所有美联储规范
summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent criticized Jerome Powell for his decision to stay on the Federal Reserve Board after he steps down as the US central bank’s chair, saying it amounts to a break with Fed tradition.

title: US Seeks to Deploy Hypersonic Missile for the First Time Against Iran
title_cn: 美国寻求首次针对伊朗部署高超音速导弹
summary: US Central Command has asked to send the Army’s long-delayed Dark Eagle hypersonic missile to the Middle East for possible use against Iran, seeking a longer-range system to hit ballistic-missile launchers deep inside the country.

title: Barrage of Big Tech Earnings Beat Estimates to Mixed Reaction
title_cn: 大型科技公司的盈利超过预期，反应不一
summary: Four tech giants beat analyst estimates as Amazon, Alphabet, Meta and Microsoft reported earnings after the bell, exposing a significant share of the market as traders reacted. Bloombeg's Ed Ludlow and Anurag Rana, along with Ron Westfall, HyperFRAME Research Infrastructure and Networking VP & practice leader, gave their initial reaction to the reports Meta shares fell in the immediate aftermarket after the company told investors it was increasing its capex for the year, citing rising AI investment costs. While Microsoft's cloud business narrowly beat estimates, it was not enough to ease concerns around its artificial intelligence strategy, as investors fear its not doing enough to capitalize on the AI market.  Alphabet beat estimates across the board, with results spurred particularly by strong growth in its cloud computing unit.  Amazon reported the largest cloud sales growth since 2022, bolstered by deals with Anthropic and OpenAI.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Supreme Court Decision on Minority Districts Will Have a Long Tail
title_cn: 最高法院关于少数族裔地区的裁决将有长尾效应
summary: The decision is likely to extend battles over redistricting for years.

title: What the Supreme Court Ruling Means for Race-Based Voting Districts
title_cn: 最高法院的裁决对基于种族的投票区意味着什么
summary: The Voting Rights Act of 1965 was a landmark law enacted to enforce voting protections enshrined in the US Constitution and eliminate longstanding obstacles to voter participation. In recent years, the Supreme Court’s conservative majority has repeatedly narrowed the scope of the 61-year-old law. On April 29, the court limited the use of the law to create predominantly Black or Hispanic election districts — its most important remaining component.

title: Former FBI Director Appears in Court for Second Indictment
title_cn: 前联邦调查局局长因第二次起诉出庭
summary: Former FBI Director James Comey made his initial court appearance Wednesday in response to federal criminal charges for allegedly threatening President Donald Trump’s life in a social media post.

title: Pentagon ‘Released’ $400 Million Ukraine Funding, Hegseth Says
title_cn: 赫格斯称五角大楼“发放”了 4 亿美元乌克兰资金
summary: Pentagon officials confirmed the release of $400 million in funds for Ukraine that already had been authorized by Congress, after the top Senate Republican overseeing defense spending criticized Pentagon leaders for withholding the money.

title: Florida Legislature Backs DeSantis Bid to Redraw Districts
title_cn: 佛罗里达州立法机构支持德桑蒂斯重新划分选区的提议
summary: Florida’s legislature on Wednesday backed Governor Ron DeSantis’ bid to redraw the state’s congressional districts in an effort to secure as many as four additional US House seats for Republicans in November’s midterm elections.

title: Trump Argues UAE’s OPEC Exit Could Lower Energy Prices Amid War
title_cn: 特朗普认为阿联酋退出欧佩克可能会在战争期间降低能源价格
summary: US President Donald Trump said the United Arab Emirates’ decision to leave OPEC would help lower energy prices, which have spiked due to the war in Iran and continue to climb.
